title: 'Gaddar': Harbhajan Singh's Home Vandalised, Sprayed With Black Paint By Angry AAP Workers After BJP Switch | VIDEO
description: Angry Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) workers on Saturday reportedly defaced the walls of the residence of former India cricketer Harbhajan Singh in Jalandhar, a day after he resigned from AAP and joined the Bharatiya Janta Party (BJP). The workers allegedly wrote "gaddar" (traitor) on walls.
